# neurodivers³

> neurodivers³ is a serial memoir and practical toolkit platform about late-diagnosed ADHD/Autism (AuDHD) life, burnout, unmasking, and building gentle systems for everyday life.

## Core Navigation & Routes

- [Homepage](https://neurodivers3.co.uk/) — Main entry point featuring mode-based readings, topic pillars, and memoir highlights.
- [Blog Archive](https://neurodivers3.co.uk/blog) — Full directory of posts filtering by pillar (Unmasked Life, Tools & Templates, Digital Life) or brain state.
- [Memoir](https://neurodivers3.co.uk/memoir) — Episodic serial memoir about late-diagnosed neurodivergence and unmasking.
- [Labs](https://neurodivers3.co.uk/labs) — Interactive, sensory-friendly experiments and web utilities (e.g., Acoustic Shield, Visual Snow Shield).
- [Store](https://neurodivers3.co.uk/store) — Digital tools, ADHD menus, executive function dashboards, and sensory templates.
- [About](https://neurodivers3.co.uk/about) — Ollie's story, founder bio, and the mission of neurodivers³.
- [Contact](https://neurodivers3.co.uk/contact) — Secure email forms and channels to reach out.
- [RSS Feed](https://neurodivers3.co.uk/rss.xml) — Full-text RSS feed for blog posts.
- [Sitemap](https://neurodivers3.co.uk/sitemap.xml) — Full sitemap of all pages.

## Key Visual Themes
Supports three real-time CSS custom-property color modes:
1. **Void (Dark)**: Charcoal backgrounds with bright pink accents.
2. **Parchment (Cream)**: Soft warm cream with deep crimson text.
3. **Incubation (Dark Green)**: Dark sage green with light sage labels.

## Technology Stack
- Next.js 16
- React 19
- Tailwind CSS 4
- Strapi CMS (headless backend integration)
